name: San Antonio Chile Verde
recipeIngredient: 16 oz. No salt added tomatoes, chopped
8 ounces Canned whole green chilies, rinsed, drained, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until soft.
2. Stir in tomatoes, chicken broth, and ground cumin.
3. Arrange chicken, skin side down, in the liquid. Cover and simmer for 35 minutes, or until chicken is tender. Remove from heat.
4. Carefully remove chicken and let cool. Shred the chicken, discarding the skin and bones.
5. Return shredded chicken to the pan. Stir in the remaining cilantro and Kikkoman Lite Soy Sauce.
6. Heat through before serving.
